image_requests.prompt: Ancient Norse god Odin, imposing cloaked figure draped in dark tattered robes, long silver-grey beard, weathered wise face with one glowing amber eye and leather eyepatch over the other, holding a tall runic spear, two black ravens perched on his shoulders, standing against a vast star-filled midnight-blue night sky, silhouette of Yggdrasil the world tree looming in background, wisps of deep blue-green aurora borealis overhead, low ground mist and atmospheric fog at base, dramatic warm golden amber rim lighting from below casting an ethereal divine glow, subject positioned center-right of frame, 16:9 cinematic landscape composition, hyperrealistic dark fantasy digital art, ultra detailed 8k
image_requests.purpose: Full-bleed hero image filling the right two-thirds of the thumbnail — Odin's figure against the starlit Norse night sky establishes the mythology subject instantly and carries the deep blue and gold color palette

html: ODINSLEEPS
why: The composition splits the frame cleanly in two: Odin's cloaked, raven-shouldered figure owns the right two-thirds of the canvas — one look and any viewer knows this is Norse mythology — while the locked hook owns the left side in massive letterforms. 'ODIN' is set in warm amber-gold Cinzel Decorative at 188px because gold signals divinity, antiquity, and power; 'SLEEPS' answers it in cool moonlit white below, and the color contrast alone tells the paradox before a single word is consciously read. A CSS gradient bridge dissolves the dark star-field into the image seamlessly, so the whole frame reads as one vast night sky rather than a split composition. At 168×94 thumbnail size the gold 'ODIN' fires first — immediate subject identification — then 'SLEEPS' lands the twist that makes the viewer think 'wait, how?' and click.
title: The Most Relaxing Norse Mythology Sleep Story — Odin, the Eddas & Ancient Wisdom
